name: UwsPNewDirProcExtr

sqlReaderQuery.value: WITH cte_transform AS (SELECT PROC_CD, PROC_CD_TYP_CD, PROC_CD_CAT_CD, USER_ID, SUBSTRING(LAST_UPDT_DT_SK,1,10) AS LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_UWSOwner}.NEWDIR_PROC) SELECT PROC_CD, PROC_CD_TYP_CD, PROC_CD_CAT_CD, USER_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT_SK FROM cte_transform
